title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries to pull, bundle and run Llama-2, CodeLlama, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally with GPU/Metal acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party async/sync Python client; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models, supports streaming and images.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official TypeScript/JavaScript SDK for Node, Deno & browsers; same generate/chat/embed API surface as Python.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package that plugs Ollama models into LangChain as LLM, chat, embeddings and tool-calling components.

title: ollama-webui (open-webui)
summary: Full-featured, self-hosted ChatGPT-style web UI that talks to local Ollama instances; supports plugins, RAG, multi-user.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library wrapping Ollama’s REST endpoints; offers sync/async APIs and model management utils.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for chatting and generating text/images with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli (node)
summary: NPM installable command-line tool that wraps ollama-js for quick prompts, chats and model listing.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team; use local models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Curated recipes showing how to run Ollama with Docker, Kubernetes, GPU stacks, RAG, function-calling, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU node-affinity and model preload.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) and compose examples for running Ollama in Docker.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri-based desktop GUI for chatting with Ollama models; cross-platform, single executable.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Reference implementation showing retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama embeddings + Chroma/Qdrant.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets a server chat with local Ollama models; supports slash commands and streaming replies.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command to query local models with optional thread context.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger (CI) module that spins up an Ollama service container for testing or pipeline LLM steps.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for building and running Ollama on NixOS with CUDA/ROCm acceleration options.

title: ollama-mistral-7b-benchmark
summary: Community repo benchmarking Mistral-7B throughput & latency across GPUs using Ollama’s native metrics.
